steps.title: Spot the relationship
steps.content: The first sentence states that a number of the 206 parades were for aviation achievements. The next sentence emphasizes the size of that number — Earhart's was just one of 16 — reinforcing and intensifying the prior claim rather than adding a separate point.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Indeed is the right transition because it intensifies and confirms the earlier claim. In addition would suggest an additional, separate fact rather than reinforcement. Nevertheless would signal contrast that isn't present, and Therefore would imply a logical conclusion the text doesn't draw.

B is correct.
